hero.title: Because everything starts with believing you are

kleia.title: Kleia — Digital platform for nutritionists
kleia.description1: We are developing a tool designed to facilitate the daily life of nutrition professionals. An app focused on organization, personalization and the experience of both the nutritionist and the patient.
kleia.description2: Project under active development. Discover Kleia ↓

content.intro: At i'm Solutions, we design and develop digital products and services that solve real-world problems with simplicity, purpose, and a human touch.
content.founding: Born from a shared passion for technology, innovation, and problem-solving, i'm Solutions was founded by Ivelina and Mario—two professionals with complementary strengths and a unified vision: to build meaningful digital solutions that improve everyday life.
content.ivelina: Ivelina, a seasoned Product Manager, spent years exploring how to turn complex challenges into simple, intuitive experiences. Frustrated by the limitations of waiting for the "perfect moment," she made a bold move—becoming the first client of her own startup. That mindset shift sparked the foundation of i'm Solutions: start small, solve clearly, build with heart.
content.mario: Mario brought the technical backbone and operational mindset to bring this vision to life. Together, they created a startup team rooted in trust, creativity, and shared values. Their collaboration proved that the real product is not just the software—it's the synergy between people who believe in long-term value.
content.mission: Our mission is to create scalable, smart, and impactful digital experiences that empower both the creators and the end users.
content.philosophy: We don't just build products.\nWe build solutions that flow.
content.cta: i'm is ready to build, are you?

video.title: Turn clinical data into unique visual experiences

journey.title: Your journey with Kleia
journey.subtitle: From the clinic to editorial design in three simple steps.

steps.title: Enter the Data
steps.desc: Record restrictions and goals once. Kleia stores them so you never repeat work.

steps.title: Assign and adjust
steps.desc: Generate full menus instantly with automatic real-time macro recalculation.

steps.title: Deliver in 1 click
steps.desc: Export the plan as a ready-to-share PDF and send it via WhatsApp directly.

features.title: Boost your practice
features.subtitle: Software designed for the high-performance nutritionist. Scientific rigor powered by AI.

items.title: Clinical precision in seconds
items.desc: Calculate kcal, macros and micros in seconds with full clinical precision.

items.title: Plans with local context
items.desc: Create assisted plans that respect the patient's tastes and local context.

items.title: Smart substitutions
items.desc: Edit dishes with smart substitutions that recalculate goals in real time.

items.title: Automatic shopping lists
items.desc: Generate exact shopping lists, automatically adding up every ingredient.

items.title: Effortless education
items.desc: Embed educational guidance into the plan without writing messages from scratch.

items.title: Fast WhatsApp/PDF delivery
items.desc: Share the clinical plan via WhatsApp or PDF professionally in one click.

pricing.title: Growth without Limits
pricing.subtitle: Full transparency, no hidden costs. Limited launch offer.

items.q: Do I need to be tech-savvy?
items.a: No. If you can use WhatsApp, you can use Kleia. We support you all the way.
The data is yours. It is used under clinical encryption and never shared.
Yes. During the pilot you can cancel anytime with no penalty.

items.q: Does Kleia replace my professional judgment?
items.a: No. Kleia automates the mechanical part, but you decide what is best for each patient.

items.q: When will it be available for everyone?
items.a: We are in a closed pilot with 10 spots. If you want to be among the first, message us on WhatsApp.

wa.message: Hi! I'm interested in learning more about Kleia and scheduling a demo. Can we talk?

meta.title: Terms and Conditions — Kleia
meta.description: Kleia Terms and Conditions of use, the digital platform for nutrition professionals.

sections.title: Introduction
body: Welcome to Kleia. These Terms and Conditions govern access, registration and use of the Kleia platform by nutrition professionals and other authorized users. By registering or using Kleia, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

sections.title: Purpose of the service
body: Kleia is a digital platform designed to help nutrition professionals manage, build, organize and follow up nutritional plans and content related to their professional practice.

sections.title: Usage Requirements and Professional Profile
body: Kleia is software intended exclusively for nutrition, dietetics and health professionals who are duly qualified and legally authorized to practice their profession in their respective jurisdiction.
By registering and using the Service, the User represents and warrants that:
• They hold the academic qualifications and professional licenses required to prescribe nutritional guidelines.
• They comply with local rules on professional registration and ethics.
• They use the platform as a tool to support their clinical judgment and not as a sole source of diagnosis or treatment.

sections.title: Disclaimer for Misuse
body: Kleia does not verify the accuracy of the credentials provided by Users at registration. Use of the platform by unqualified persons or for self-diagnosis is strictly prohibited. Kleia disclaims all liability for any damage, harm or claim arising from:
• Use of the tool by persons without the necessary technical or legal training (professional misconduct).
• The application of AI-generated plans without prior review, correction and validation by a qualified professional.
• Health decisions made by individual users who access the platform without professional supervision.

sections.title: Professional use
body: The user acknowledges that Kleia is a support tool. Content generated, suggested, organized or adapted by the platform, including AI-based features, must be reviewed and validated by the professional before being used with clients or patients.

sections.title: User responsibility
body: The user agrees to:
• provide truthful and up-to-date information;
• keep their access credentials confidential;
• use the platform in accordance with the law, professional ethics and these Terms;
• not enter data unless they have a valid legal basis to do so;
• always review and supervise the final content delivered to their clients.

sections.title: Third-party data
body: If the user enters personal data of third parties, including health data, they declare that they are entitled to do so and that they have complied with information duties and any other applicable legal requirements.

sections.title: Artificial intelligence
body: Kleia may incorporate AI-based features to assist in organizing, structuring or proposing content. These features do not replace professional judgment, diagnosis, clinical assessment or the user's responsibility.

sections.title: Availability
body: Kleia will use reasonable efforts to keep the platform available, without guaranteeing uninterrupted or error-free operation.

sections.title: Intellectual property
body: All rights to the platform, its design, technology, brand, base content and distinctive elements belong to Kleia or its licensors. The user retains ownership of their own content entered into the platform, to the extent permitted by law.

sections.title: Suspension or cancellation
body: Kleia may suspend or cancel accounts in case of misuse, legal breach, security risk or non-compliance with these Terms.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
body: Kleia acts as a support tool. Liability for the final professional decision, as well as for the clinical or nutritional use of the content, lies with the professional user.

sections.title: Modifications
body: Kleia may update these Terms. When changes are material, the user will be informed by reasonable means.

sections.title: Applicable law and contact
body: These Terms shall be governed by the applicable law indicated by Kleia in the version in force. For any legal or contractual inquiry, you can contact: legal@kleia.com.
